title: rubus dasyneurus
intro: Rubus dasyneurus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus dasyneurus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Rubus dasyneurus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
